title: Lesson 59 (Vocab) - ラジオ, ラーメン, リレー...
description: ラジオ (Radio) and ルール (Rule). ラーメン is one of the most famous Katakana words in the world!

items.gloss: ruby; ruby character; small hiragana or katakana readings of kanji usually above or to the side of the kanji (esp. used by printers and in ref. to printed material); Ruby (programming language)
